deferredUpdates.name: @sentry/react-native
deferredUpdates.reason: Major v8 migration needs a dedicated Sentry PR with config review, source map verification, and native QA.

deferredUpdates.name: eslint
deferredUpdates.reason: ESLint 10 should wait for eslint-config-expo compatibility confirmation.

deferredUpdates.name: react-native
deferredUpdates.reason: Expo SDK 55 expects react-native 0.83.6; npm latest is outside the supported Expo native set.

deferredUpdates.name: react-native-reanimated
deferredUpdates.reason: react-native-reanimated 4.3.0 requires react-native-worklets 0.8.x, while Expo SDK 55 expects worklets 0.7.4.

deferredUpdates.name: react-native-worklets
deferredUpdates.reason: Expo SDK 55 expects react-native-worklets 0.7.4; npm latest is outside the supported Expo native set.

deferredUpdates.name: tailwindcss
deferredUpdates.reason: Tailwind 4 requires NativeWind compatibility proof and a dedicated styling migration.
